item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Foster Youth Tax Credit
item.description:
👀 Foster Youth Tax Credit

Foster youth tax credit 119th Congress: refundable credit for current/former foster youth aging out · transition-to-independence support. Composes with Save-the-World Paper 12 + Federal Juvenile Justice + #5 Family Table. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
